title: The Book of Five Rings
author: Miyamoto Musashi
description: The Book of Five Rings by Miyamoto Musashi from Coterie Classics All Coterie Classics have been formatted for ereaders and devices and include a bonus link to the free audio book. “Think lightly of yourself and deeply of the world” ― Miyamoto Musashi, A Book of Five Rings The Book of Five Rings is a classic collection of wisdom and strategy.
